versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   jupyterhub-4-3-5                true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install jupyterhub oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=jupyterhub:4.3.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.8" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   jupyterhub-4-3-5                true
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-8                  true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        jupyterhub:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            hosts: ['juphub.example.com']
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
examples.contentHtml:
Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install jupyterhub oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=jupyterhub:4.3.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.8" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   jupyterhub-4-3-5                true
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-8                  true

Deploy service template

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: jupyterhub
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: jupyterhub-4-3-5
      name: jupyterhub
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        jupyterhub:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            hosts: ['juphub.example.com']
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: jupyterhub
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443

Sign in using default login admin:admin.
